KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_STARTER_RELIC.title: Mr. Hat
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_STARTER_RELIC.descr: At the end of your turn, randomly play 1 [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card from your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_STARTER_RELIC.flavo: Mr. Hat is my best friend.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_ANICENT_RELIC.title: Mr. Hat with Roses
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_ANICENT_RELIC.descr: At the end of your turn, randomly play 1 [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card from your hand. Whenever you play an [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card, gain 1 [gold]Thorns[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_ANICENT_RELIC.flavo: A friend brought some flowers for Mr. Hat.
